Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Structures and formats the stocked and missing parts data into a clean, organized layout ready for Excel export.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Ensures the output is consistently formatted and easy to read without any manual spreadsheet work from Mark or the team.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark a formatted Excel file attachment showing DFC's stocked parts and inventory gaps for the requested vehicle.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers a complete, ready-to-use catalog file directly to Mark within minutes of form submission, replacing a process that previously required manual research and back-and-forth.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Queries live inventory data for every part on the weekly backorder report, pulling on-hand quantities, on-order status, and in-transit records for each line item.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent, manual inventory lookups with a single automated pull that takes seconds instead of hours.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches each line of the backorder report with the live Dream inventory fields and flags any parts that have no on-hand, on-order, or in-transit source — marking them as dead ends.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Gives the team an instantly actionable report with every status pre-filled and problem parts clearly flagged, eliminating manual row-by-row review.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for flagged backorder items, pre-written with the relevant part and status context for team review before sending.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Dramatically reduces the time spent drafting individual customer updates and ensures no backorder communication falls through the cracks.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract make, model, year, and part fitment data for all two-piece rotor listings.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Compiles competitor and supplier catalog data that would take days to gather manually into a structured dataset in a single automated run.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped two-piece rotor fitments against DFC's existing parts catalog and logs matched and unmatched records into a structured reference sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly identifies where DFC has coverage and where gaps exist in the two-piece rotor market, informing sourcing and product development decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers to gather demand data for two-piece rotors on specific vehicle applications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds real demand signal from actual customers without manual outreach effort, giving Dino data-backed justification for inventory or sourcing decisions.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active ad copy across Meta and TikTok campaigns, extracting headlines, body text, and descriptions from every live ad into a scannable dataset.
Meta Investigation.impact: Instantly surfaces the full universe of live ad copy without anyone manually opening each ad in the platform, making large-scale copy audits feasible on demand.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every piece of collected ad copy for specified phrases or patterns and returns a flagged list with the exact ad, field, and matched text for each hit.
Meta Investigation.impact: Finds every instance of a problematic or targeted phrase across hundreds of ads in seconds, a task that would take a human reviewer hours to complete manually.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a structured report listing every flagged ad with the exact field and copy where each phrase match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a precise, actionable list to the right person immediately, enabling fast compliance action or copy corrections without any manual digging.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is in strong shape, with 27 of 55 agents completed, 11 actively in progress, and 17 more planned for future development. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages — the team is heads-down executing on what's already in motion. With nearly half the pipeline fully deployed and running across email, SMS, paid media, SEO, support, and sales workflows, the foundation we've built continues to drive real daily impact across the business. More updates to come as in-progress agents push toward completion!
